subcodes.first_line: O namesake of the Desired One, may my soul be sacrificed to Thy name. As Shaykh Sa'di sayeth, Thy name was mentioned and the lovers [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سمی حضرت مقصود جانم فدای نام تو باد علی قول شیخ سعدی نام تو میرفت و عاشقان
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual transformation, @service to others; to the Cause of God
